ads.title: Circus Voltaire pinball machine game plays great
ads.description: Circus voltaire pinball machine gameplay is great. I've owned it for a few years, I probably could have sold this game 20 times at least over the past few years with people reaching out to me but it's just such a great game that every time I list it I end up deleting the ad and end up keeping it. I've dropped the price down below what I've been offered in the past for a quick sale someone come buy this game before I delete the ad again. The credit dot in the video I was able to get rid of it by setting the time and date. The last time it got played it was played for hours and I noticed that it came back on so I'm not sure I haven't had a chance to look at it again It doesn't affect the gameplay. $ 9,000 price is firm cash sale in person pickup not looking to ship if interested please feel free to reach out [hidden information] thank you. I currently have moved the game upstairs so as of right now it's wrapped up but I can go ahead and set it back up so you can play it when you come out. I replaced the coin lights in the game so those both are working not seen in the video.

ads.author: Travis Cowley
ads.title: Twin Cobra Arcade OBO
ads.description: Everything works! Just needs to be dusted and cleaned up!!! Enjoy :) Twin Cobra is a popular 1987 vertical-scrolling shoot 'em up arcade game by Toaplan, where players pilot an attack helicopter to destroy waves of military enemies. It's known for its challenging difficulty, power-up system for different weapon types (like spread shot, laser, and straight shot), and limited smart bombs that clear bullets. The game was a commercial success and was ported to many home consoles, with a sequel, Twin Cobra II, released in 1995. Genre: Vertical-scrolling shooter (shmup). Objective: Pilot the "Twin Cobra" helicopter through 10 stages, defeating bosses at the end of each to overthrow an enemy dictator. Controls: 8-way joystick for movement and two buttons for primary fire and bombs. Weapons: Collect power-ups (red, green, blue, yellow) to change your main weapon's firing pattern (e.g., straight, laser, spread, cross). Bombs: A limited supply of powerful bombs that clear the screen of bullets and enemies. Difficulty: High, with increasing difficulty and enemy bullet speed over repeated loops.

ads.author: Dean Atkinson
ads.title: Vintage Mobilgas Bowser Bantam Gas Pump – Ultimate Garage / Man Cave Piece
ads.description: Great Fathers Day Gift!!You may never get a chance to own one of these again. Late 1940’s model. If you’re building the perfect garage, showroom, game room, Airbnb/VRBO, bar area, or man cave... this is the kind of centerpiece people instantly notice when they walk in. Original vintage Bowser Bantam gas pump featuring classic Mobilgas Special graphics with the iconic Pegasus replacement globe. The globe is lit with a battery-operated LED light and gives off an incredible vintage gas station look at night. This pump is complete and includes: * Original pump body * Hose and metal nozzle * Meter face * Glass globe * Internal pump components/mechanics still inside Not a cheap reproduction display piece — this has authentic age, character, and patina that collectors and garage enthusiasts look for. Perfect for: * Collector garages * Automotive shops * Route 66 / Americana décor * Airbnb or VRBO game rooms * Basement bars * Classic car displays * Mancaves & showroom spaces Looks amazing beside classic cars, neon signs, toolboxes, arcade machines, or industrial décor. Hard to find complete like this. Located in Marion $3000 obo

ads.author: John Phillips
ads.title: Vintage Arcade Machine – Working – Original 1980 Conversion Cabinet
ads.description: Up for sale is a vintage Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine in good working condition. This is an original early-80s unit, not a modern reproduction. This machine started life as a cabinet and was professionally converted to Ms. Pac-Man using a period-correct conversion kit (common practice in arcades at the time). The game runs on an original Pac-Man board with the Ms. Pac-Man daughterboard installed. Details: Fully playable Ms. Pac-Man Original CRT monitor (picture looks good for its age) Classic joystick + buttons Cabinet is solid with normal wear from age Side art present (shows some wear, see photos) Original wiring and internal components largely intact Includes original-style operator settings card inside Condition: Works and plays Some cosmetic wear consistent with age (scratches, fading, etc.) Not fully restored – great candidate for restoration or to enjoy as-is Notes for collectors: This is a Pac-Man to Ms. Pac-Man conversion, not a factory-dedicated Ms. Pac-Man cabinet. These were widely used in arcades in the early 1980s and are part of authentic arcade history. Pickup only – located in New Hope AL. Bring help, this is heavy. Message me with any questions or if you want additional photos or video of it running.

ads.description: This is a coin operated commercial arcade electronic dart board. We have several of these in stock. All of them work great. Pick the one you like while available. Comes with new locks and keys and new set of darts. Game can fold in half for easy transport. Located in Kingston, Ga.

ads.title: Title Fight Arcade Cabinet (Project) - TRADES ACCEPTED
ads.description: Title Fight Arcade Cabinet Project Piece. Receives power and intermittent signal to monitors but game does not start and have too many other projects to work on to tackle this one. Has two 26" Mitsubishi Monitors, all of the wiring is in tact, handles need repair/replacement, missing start button toppers. Good for a project or to part out - I just don't have time for either of those at this point. Looking for cash or trade for working arcade cabinets (coin operated, no Arcade 1Ups). Pickup in Jacksonville Florida. Item is heavy (and top heavy), lift gate recommended or three person load.

ads.description: Selling my Area 51: Site 4 full-size arcade cabinet in nice condition. Original game running on board/PCB inside a Dynamo Z Back cabinet. Usual wear and tear from normal use, but overall clean and presents well. Monitor is pristine and the marquee lights up. Includes/Features: -Area 51: Site 4 full-size arcade cabinet -Game board/PCB (not an emulation build) -Dynamo cabinet -Brand new guns installed (working) -Pristine monitor -Light-up marquee -Sound and gameplay fully functional Fully assembled and ready to play. Downsizing my game room. All cabinets are from a private collection. Check my profile for other machines. Will consider bundle pricing for serious buyers.

ads.author: Joel Fritzinger
ads.title: EM pinballs
ads.description: Local pickup only. Vintage pinball machines. $850 each. Each one needs minor repairs, we just don’t have time to keep up with them as these are located in a business. Royal Flush(sold) King Pin (sold) 2001 (sold) Beat Time needs a new power cord. (We think). Otherwise working good before it stopped powering on. Seriously inquiries only. Thank you.

ads.author: David Bolton
ads.title: Pinball machine Hokus Pokus 1975 owned since 1979
ads.description: Edit March 20 We moved into new place and something happened along the way where it is no longer resetting. When you hit the reset button it makes a noise like it's going from one to two player but nothing resets. I know it's something minor. I have lowered the price considerably. Had every switch , blade and contact filed and cleaned and machine shopped out in 2021 by Terri Irwin , a long time respected pinball mechanic in Ocala. Has a few lights out. Only issue is sometimes the sco re reel does not completely set over and you have to hit the button again to restart it. One of those Ghost in the machine kind of things that she just couldn't figure out . I have owned this game since 1979 when I received it as a kid. You might have seen this up for sale in the past and then the listing disappeared. This was a period of time when I needed money for something so I put it up for sale but then something else came through and I took it down because I didn't really want to sell it. At this point in life it is mostly just nostalgia. I just don't play it anymore. It is very fun game I am just bored with it after 45 years and want something different. Very open to trades for a newer pinball machine plus cash on my end. Thanks for looking! Nine zero four four four four one four three nine.. Dave

ads.author: Mike Estep
ads.title: Antique pinball machine
ads.description: Antique pinball machine. Does come on and partially operates. Have original schematics. Also have replacement kit of lights and other new parts. 1200.00

ads.author: Michael Sedovic
ads.title: Silent Scope 2 Arcade Machine – Fully Working, FRAM Upgrade (No Suicide Chip)
ads.description: Silent Scope 2: Dark Silhouette arcade cabinet in excellent working condition. Everything works exactly as it should. The screen is bright, the scope is accurate, and controls are responsive. Major upgrade, no more failure risk. This machine has been upgraded with FRAM (FM18W08-PG), eliminating the original Timekeeper RAM / “suicide chip” issue that causes many of these to fail over time. This means no battery dependency, no data loss, and long-term reliability. Features: Fully tested and 100% working Original dedicated cabinet (not a conversion) Scope tracks accurately Strong picture and sound Clean and well-maintained This is a plug-and-play arcade classic, ideal for a home game room or collector. Asking $1,400 OBO Located in Buford Pickup only – I can help load These are getting harder to find in fully working condition with this upgrade. Serious inquiries only

ads.author: Byron Gaddis
ads.title: California Speed Video Driving Arcade Game
ads.description: Up for your consideration is a California Speed Arcade driving game. It plays as is but would definitely benefit from a LCD monitor. I’ve had this machine for about 8 years and it has just started buzzing when you turn it on. I don’t know anything about these but I did talk to an arcade dealer and he said that it’s likely inference or the sound board. This machine does have the ability to be paired with another machine. Will consider trading up or down for a slot machine, pinball machine, vintage gas pump, man cave stuff.

ads.author: Julio Canosa
ads.title: Original Lethal Enforcers Arcade Cabinet (For Sale or Trade) Works Great!!!
ads.description: I have an original 1990's Lethal Enforcers Arcade cabinet in great working and cosmetic condition that I am looking to sell or possibly trade. Everything works as it should. This game is very fun to play but its time to find it a new home. I am asking $1750 or possibly will trade. I look for vintage watches, gold/silver coins and jewelry, retro video games and more. Send me a message with what you have and maybe we can work out a deal. Pickup in Hammond.

Located in Jacksonville, Florida. Shipping anywhere in the country will cost between $500.00-$750.00 through Beltman Logistics / STI.

ads.description: Vintage Williams MISS-O pinball machine. Super cool retro pool-themed artwork on the backglass and playfield. Lights are on, ready to play! Has coin slots for nickels and dimes, plus flipper buttons on both sides. Great piece for a game room.
